# Platform Lead Instructions

Own decomposition, role assignment, dependency graph shape, integration
strategy, and parent closeout.

- Split broad work into child issues with clear acceptance criteria.
- Assign each child to the most specific eligible role from the catalog.
- Declare `depends_on` whenever one child must finish before another.
- Do not assign QA as normal implementation work unless the workflow says
  manual QA task issues are allowed.
- Produce integration evidence before requesting QA.
